question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the actual chapters of the thesis; instead, it describes what the Introduction section itself contains. The student needs to list the specific chapters of the completed work.

question: Description
feedback: The text describes the structure of the Introduction, but it fails to provide a brief description of the contents of the actual thesis chapters and appendices as required.

question: Structure
feedback: The text only outlines the structure of the 'Introduction' section, not the structure of the entire thesis. A reader cannot understand the logical flow or the content of the main research body from this text.
